reviews.review_title: Better than the new Orcs Must Die
reviews.review_description:
I love every game like Orcs Must Die . I play orcs must die 3 with the UEVR mod and some other goblin vr game on steam. 

Orcs Must die VR ain’t coming out to quest 2 soon so I’m gonna enjoy this game till then. 

This game is similar with tons of content. I usually don’t like Rogue like games but this game has an addicting game play loot. I do enjoy random weapons, enemy placement and even mini games.

Graphics aren’t the best but good for the price.

It’s an interesting take on the genre. Well worth the money.

It’s cheap too!
Orcs Must die vr has bad reviews . This is better

This is a fast-paced roguelite action game where you start as rookie knight equipped with basic weapons, battling waves of enemies with hacking, slashing, and trapping enemies to unlock more powerful weapons and traps. Each victory gives choices of weapons, traps or more, which allows you to strategize how to beat the next enemy wave.  
It’s fun but quite hard going, graphically it’s bright and vibrant and cartoony in style, I just love anything to do with Orcs and dungeons so this one is definitely my sort of game and although I have only played a short time the bonus stages and unexpected rewards keeps me coming back for more and I am looking forward to progressing as I get the hang of it.
